posts.title: This is what happens when The Government is invested in a Great Global Warming Ice-Free Fantasy - Great Lakes shipping lost third of season to ‘inadequate icebreaking’

link_metadata.description: The Lake Carriers Association said in a report that it lost 82 shipping days this year because the US Coast Guard failed to break enough ice. Despite repeated attempts, Congress hasn’t invested in a new icebreaker for the Great Lakes.
link_metadata.title: Great Lakes shipping lost third of season to ‘inadequate icebreaking’ - Bridge Michigan
